params.prompt: Vertical 9:16 realistic documentary image, single owl only, perched upright, body/front/chest facing viewer, head rotated far backward over one shoulder so it is looking behind itself, the pose clearly demonstrates an owl's nearly 270 degree head turn, not a normal side glance, clean silhouette, natural feathers, simple blurred forest background, no text, no watermark, no UI, no labels, no arrows, no diagram, no anatomy cutaway, no duplicate head, no extra animals, no horror.
